name: Nestlé S.A.
description: Nestlé S.A. is a Swiss multinational food and drink processing conglomerate headquartered in Vevey, Switzerland. As the world's largest publicly held food company by revenue, it operates a vast portfolio of brands spanning categories such as baby food, bottled water, cereals, coffee, confectionery, dairy products, and pet care. With a history dating back to the 19th century, Nestlé maintains a global presence, operating factories and conducting business in nearly every country worldwide. The company is committed to nutrition, health, and wellness, continuously evolving its product offerings to meet changing consumer preferences and global sustainability standards.
